text:
/toge /ci1 1 大きい！！
これが黒の民と呼ばれてる人？
白の民を襲うなんて許せない…！
/ci3 5 角を折ってお仕置きしてあげよう！

/toge /ci1 They're huge! Are these the people they
call the Nightfallers? Their attacks on the
Daybreakers are unforgivable!
/ci3 5 Let's agree to teach them a lesson!

大きい！！
これが黒の民と呼ばれてる人？
白の民を襲うなんて許せない…！
角を折ってお仕置きしてあげよう！

They're huge! Are these the people they
call the Nightfallers? Their attacks on the
Daybreakers are unforgivable!
Let's agree to teach them a lesson!
